name: paolog-pynecraft

metadata.name: Paolog-Pynecraft
metadata.summary: A Minecraft recreation made with Ursina

documentation:
# Help me
Install:
```bash
python3 -m pip install Paolog_Pynecraft
```
Upgrade already installed Pynecraft:
```bash
python3 -m pip install Paolog_Pynecraft --upgrade
```
```bash
python3 -m Paolog_Pynecraft
```
